_README: Runtime topic id -> canonical NPP topic id, per grade.
WHY THIS FILE EXISTS: the embed sends a Thinkific lesson id in
`selected_topic` (e.g. 12880). The workbook is designed to carry that
THINKIFIC_RESOURCES.thinkific_lesson_id, but BOTH columns are currently
empty in every shipped grade workbook, so nothing can resolve.
Entries here are operator-supplied facts, not code. Resolution logic reads
this file generically - adding an id never requires a code change.
DURABLE FIX: populate thinkific_lesson_id in the workbook. Once a runtime
id resolves from the sheet, its entry here becomes redundant (the sheet is
consulted first) and can be deleted.
PROVENANCE: 12880 -> 6-04-035 was observed in production on 2026-07-21
'Prosirivanje razlomaka'. It is NOT derivable from the shipped data.
